title: Stainless Steel Cookware Set, 12 Piece Kitchen Induction Cookware Set, Works with Induction/Electric and Gas Cooktops, Kitchen Cooking Set with Glass Lid (Silver S)
features: ❤️【12-PIECE COOKWARE SET】12-piece kitchen cookware sets includes: 1.5QT Sauce Pan with Glass Lid, 2,5QT Sauce Pan with Glass Lid, 3.5QT Stockpot with Glass Lid, 4.4QT Stockpot with Glass Lid, 6.9QT Stockpot with Glass Lid, and two Steamer . It's the perfect all-in-one cooking set for all kitchen.

🔥【DURABILITY】: When it comes to cooking equipment, stainless steel is one of the most durable materials. The Mihoho stainless steel pot set will last for years and will not rust, chip, dent, crack or stain under normal use. Even better, stainless steel is generally dishwasher safe and can handle being stored in the refrigerator.

🎁【BRINGS THE HEAT】: Elevate your culinary experience with Mihoho's 5 ply Stainless Steel Cookware Set designed for optimal heat distribution. Consciously crafted lightweight pots and pans set that prioritizes your health. Experience the joy of cooking without chemical coatings, bringing more heat to your kitchen while keeping it free from toxins

🌟【DISHWASHER AND OVEN SAFE】: This entire set is as easy to clean as it is to use. It's dishwasher safe for fast and easy clean-up. No more struggling to do the dishes when you can let your dishwasher do all the work. This set is also oven safe up to 350 degrees Fahrenheit, so you can sear your food and then finish it off in the oven for that perfect crust.
👊【100% GUARANTEE】: If you have any questions with our product, please feel free to contact our customer service. We will address your concern to the best.
description: Product Description Reliable Cookware for Every Meal Mihoho the classic stainless steel cookware is designed to save you time in the kitchen and provide versatility in cooking. The exteriors of the stainless steel pots feature a handsome brushed finish, while the interiors are mirror-polished for non-reactive, quick release of foods This fabulous set consists of basics and more The 1.5 & 2.5-quart saucepan with lid takes care of everything from oatmeal to bechamel sauce 3.5-quart covered saute pan with cover, great for braising meats and cooking fish fillets and two 4.4/6.9-quart covered stockpot for stews and soups Dishwasher-safe, this set has no coatings to flake off or plastic to melt, and will surely be passed down to the next generation. 1.5QT Sauce Pan with Glass Lid 2,5QT Sauce Pan with Glass Lid 3.5QT Stockpot with Glass Lid 4.4QT Stockpot with Glass Lid 6.9QT Stockpot with Glass Lid 2*Steaming grid This elegant 12-Piece Cooking Pot Set gives you the versatility to bring all your favorite recipes to life.
